**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Limit function statements and lines.

## Bad

```go
func run() { /* more than 50 statements or 75 lines */ }
```

## Good

```go
func run() { load(); process(); save() }
```
